title: Whos better Rei or Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Who's better, Rei or Asuka? Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:16 am Alright let's get this over with. Who is better, Rei Ayanami or Asuka Langley-Soryu. My opinion? Rei is so much cooler than Asuka it's not even funny. Don't get me wrong, I like Asuka, but god is she annoying at times. And she treats Shinji like garbage, poor poor Shinji. Rei on the hand has a subtle beauty that goes beyond just looks... it goes straight to her soul. The soul of humanities mother, the body of a 14 year old child. How can one little red head compete with that?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:27 am Oh god! Urge to close.... Rising!!!

[]: Post by Abaddon » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:37 am I say Rei is the best, Asuka doesn't even hold a candle to her.

[]: Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:41 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Oh god! Urge to close.... Rising!!!

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:41 am why would you say that? Rei hasn't lived through what Asuka has...

[]: Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:42 am So, dying and than being brought back to life against your will, than living with that fact for the rest of your life isn't as bad as seeing your mom kill herself?

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:21 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Oh god! Urge to close.... Rising!!!

[]: Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:21 am I wish this would die.

[]: Post by coff » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:50 am Rei was also the worst pilot. Asuka all the way.

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:01 am coff wrote: Rei was also the worst pilot. Asuka all the way.

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:26 am Asuka's got ummm... assets. Yeah, "Assets" thats it. Actully the first time I saw NGE Rei just kinda freaked me out more than anything and Asuka was kinda more normal than her at first then went Psycho. Plus she's a red head

[]: Post by RubberSoul » Mon Jul 12, 2004 11:50 am I can't really say because I like them both.

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:26 pm Asuka Langley wrote: I wish this would die.

[]: Post by coff » Mon Jul 12, 2004 3:55 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: [ she just wasnt as good as the others.

[]: Post by Phaze » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:01 pm By the end of the series, she's better at piloting than Asuka. She just never really got a chance to fight by herself. Plus, she has no fear for her life.

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:15 pm the question is : does she have a will? it seems like she doesnt get one till the third Rei...

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:21 pm sadsadshinji wrote: the question is : does she have a will? it seems like she doesnt get one till the third Rei...

[]: Post by Phaze » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:24 pm TheMessiah wrote: i dont think she was meant to be an eva pilot as much as they used that as a cover for what they were really using her as

[]: Post by Esion » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:26 pm I'm not so sure about that because only certain people can pilot the evas. She was produced with the ability to pilot an eva in mind. Although it wasn't her real purpose.

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:27 pm Phaze wrote: TheMessiah wrote: i dont think she was meant to be an eva pilot as much as they used that as a cover for what they were really using her as
summary: []: Who's better, Rei or Asuka? Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:16 am Alright let's get this over with. Who is better, Rei Ayanami or Asuka Langley-Soryu. My opinion? Article: Whos better Rei or Asuka
[]: Who's better, Rei or Asuka? Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:16 am Alright let's get this over with. Who is better, Rei Ayanami or Asuka Langley-Soryu. My opinion? Rei is so much cooler than Asuka it's not even funny. Don't get me wrong, I like Asuka, but god is she annoying at times. And she treats Shinji like garbage, poor poor Shinji. Rei on the hand has a subtle beauty that goes beyond just looks... it goes straight to her soul. The soul of humanities mother, the body of a 14 year old child. How can one little red head compete with that?
